title: Harvest of the Dead: Halloween Night
original_title: Harvest of the Dead: Halloween Night
overview: It's the day after the events of the first film and Sally Burns and her friends are preparing for a Halloween party. As the evening of fun kicks off, unbeknownst to them, The Plague Doctor and The Creature are preparing to join them.
